channel.title: +Hindu-vidyA groups on संस्कृतजालक्षेत्रम्
channel.description: Recent content in +Hindu-vidyA groups on संस्कृतजालक्षेत्रम्

item.title: Posting-rules
item.description: No spam No spam. Don’t keep sending essentially the same message repeatedly in different threads. (BVP examples: BVK’s vAk yoga, Achyut’s mAheshwara sUtras) Polite communication with a couple of caveats “No first strike” principle. If someone crosses the line, one should not be blamed for responding in the same manner (BVP example: “haters”). One should be free to harshly and clearly criticize ideas - without getting to the person proposing them.
